nasb.text: But they will become his slaves so that they may learn the difference between My service and the service of the kingdoms of the countries.”

esv.text: Nevertheless, they shall be servants to him, that they may know my service and the service of the kingdoms of the countries.”

cnv.text: 雖然這樣，他們仍必作示撒的僕人，好使他們知道，服事我和服事世上的列國有甚麼分別。”

ccb.text: 然而，他们必做示撒的仆人，好让他们体验事奉我和服侍世上的君王的不同。”
